name_en: Self-Employment Assistance (Aide à la création d'entreprise — IPOP / Objectif emploi)
name_fr: Programme d'aide au travail autonome (ATA) — Services Québec
description_en: Quebec's Self-Employment Assistance program helps unemployed individuals launch a business by providing weekly income support and business coaching during the startup phase.
description_fr: Le programme ATA aide les personnes sans emploi à lancer une entreprise en offrant un soutien financier hebdomadaire et un accompagnement pendant la phase de démarrage.

funding_details.weekly_allowance_cad: Equivalent to regular EI or social assistance benefits
funding_details.note_en: Participants are exempt from job-search requirements while in the program

must_be_en: Currently receiving EI benefits, or eligible for EI, or receiving social assistance
Have a viable business project assessed by a Services Québec advisor
eligibility.business_stage: Pre-launch or very early stage (not yet operational for more than a few months)

application_process_en: Contact your local Services Québec employment centre
Submit a business plan for evaluation
Approved participants receive weekly financial support
Ongoing coaching and check-ins during the program
